title: leptobalanus stevensii
intro: Leptobalanus stevensii, also known as Stevens' Leptobalanus, is a type of plant, however, I can't find any information on a plant with this name.
intro_study: According to "International journal of leprosy and other mycobacterial diseases : official organ of the International Leprosy Association", leptobalanus stevensii (also known as oil of hydnocarpus) has been found to have a beneficial effect on wound healing, increasing the strength of scar tissue and collagen.
